title: Support - App, user is logged out, correct data
scenario: Support > App card in App Settings shows correct tenant data when logged in, and displays None for tenant name/ID/user ID, unchanged App ID, and unknown last connection after logout
steps: Note the displayed tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, App ID, and last connection details
Log out of the current tenant account
Go back to App Settings → Support → App card
expected: When logged into a tenant, the App card displays the correct tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, App ID, and last connection. After logging out, the tenant name, tenant ID, and user ID show as None, the App ID remains unchanged, and the last connection shows as unknown.
